current_5fps_text: Later on. Consult your doctor or pharmacist before using any medicine during pregnancy. Lasts up to 4 hours. Gaviscon Double Action Tablets/Liquid for heartburn & indigestion. Always read the label RB-M-108683.

frames.ocr_text:
For 7 Symptoms Think GAVISCON
Later on. Consult your doctor or pharmacist before using any medicine during pregnancy. Lasts up to 4 hours. Gaviscon Double Action Tablets/Liquid for heartburn & indigestion. Always read the label RB-M-108683.
